list.name: STRONG - clean_build/cpu_usage
list.query:
from(bucket: "performance_lab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regression_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "xcode")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.workflow == "clean_build")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "cpu_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.severity == "strong")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: "STRONG: cpu_usage z=" + string(v: r.z_score)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regression_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.application == "xcode")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.workflow =~ /${workflow}/)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

list.name: workflow
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "performance_lab",
  tag: "workflow",
  predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "performance_metrics" and r.application == "xcode"
)
